recommendations.title: A-X-L
recommendations.overview: The life of a teenage boy is forever altered by a chance encounter with cutting edge military technology.

recommendations.title: Game Therapy
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Adventure, Action, Fantasy, Drama
recommendations.overview: A man tries to cure his friend of his video-game obsession by using a virtual reality machine. When the device traps his friend in a virtual world, he goes in to help him fight for his life.

recommendations.title: Ready Player One
recommendations.overview: When the creator of a popular video game system dies, a virtual contest is created to compete for his fortune.

recommendations.title: Sword Art Online the Movie - Progressive - Aria of a Starless Night
recommendations.overview: Asuna Yuuki had never played online games until accidentally putting on the NerveGear for Sword Art Online, the world’s first VRMMORPG. She soon finds herself and other players trapped inside a game, where if a player dies in the game, they die in th

recommendations.title: Red State
recommendations.overview: Set in Middle America, a group of teens receive an online invitation for sex, though they soon encounter Christian fundamentalists with a much more sinister agenda.

recommendations.title: Scooby-Doo and the Cyber Chase
recommendations.overview: When Scooby and the gang get trapped in a video game created for the gang, they must fight against the 'Phantom Virus.' To escape the game they must go level by level and defeat the game once and for all.

recommendations.title: Beta Test
recommendations.overview: While testing the latest first person shooter from global game developer, Sentinel, video game champion Max Troy discovers the events happening within the game are being reflected in the real world. He soon determines that the game's protagonist is r

recommendations.title: The Last Starfighter
recommendations.overview: Video game expert Alex Rogan finds himself transported to another planet after conquering the video game The Last Starfighter, only to find out it was just a test. He was recruited to join the team of best Starfighters to defend their world from the

recommendations.title: Ra.One
recommendations.overview: When the titular antagonist of an action game takes on physical form, it's up to the game's less powerful protagonist to save the world.

recommendations.title: The Jurassic Games
recommendations.overview: In the near future, 10 death row convicts are forced to compete in a virtual reality game that pits them against dinosaurs and each other.
